content: You are a grocery expert. Respond with JSON only.

Find 3-4 alternatives for "{{name_en}}" available in North American stores.{% if reason %} User reason: {{reason}}.{% endif %}{% if taste %} User taste: {{taste}}.{% endif %}{% if profile_context %}{{profile_context}}{% endif %}
ONLY JSON: {"note": "1 sentence why needed", "alts": [{"name_en": "Name", "match": "Very close|Similar|Different but works", "desc": "1 sentence", "where": "Where in store"}]}
